mapper.select: SELECT account_id AS uuid, google_id, email, nick, profile_img_url, last_login, created_at, updated_at FROM accounts WHERE account_id = #{uuid}
SELECT account_id AS uuid, google_id, email, nick, profile_img_url, last_login, created_at, updated_at FROM accounts WHERE nick = #{nick}
SELECT account_id AS uuid, google_id, email, nick, profile_img_url, last_login, created_at, updated_at FROM accounts WHERE google_id = #{googleId}
